diff.content:
diff --git a/access.py b/access.py
--- a/access.py
+++ b/access.py
@@ -1,2 +1,7 @@
+class AccessPolicyAdapter:
+    def evaluate(self, actor, resource):
+        return is_allowed(actor, resource)
+
 def can_view(actor, resource):
-    return is_allowed(actor, resource)
+    adapter = AccessPolicyAdapter()
+    return adapter.evaluate(actor, resource)

change_contract.goal: Keep resource visibility on the existing access policy.
acceptance_criteria: can_view returns the result of is_allowed.

nearby_patterns.label: Direct policy use
nearby_patterns.summary: Call policy functions directly unless adapting different semantics.
